evidence.q1: Excluded Liabilities has the meaning stated in Section 5.
evidence.q2: Buyer assumes only the Assumed Liabilities
evidence.q4: Buyer and Seller intend a purchase of assets and not a merger, consolidation, or equity acquisition.
